title: SiTime Valuation and Investment Analysis - AI Data Center Play
text: SiTime Corporation (NASDAQ:SITM) is increasingly becoming a key player in AI infrastructure, with precision timing components being critical for data center operations. The company's recent AI data center growth trajectory and newly introduced Elite 2 Super-TCXO targeting timing applications has positioned it favorably. With strategic Renesas timing business acquisition expected, the company projects reaching $1.5 billion in cumulative AI data center market by 2030. Long-term financial models target 25%-30% annual revenue growth with 65% gross margin and 30% operating margin targets expected to be achieved in Q2 2026. SiTime's revenue forecast to grow 21% per year on average during the next 3 years, with earnings growth of 27.6% per year.
